title: The Nurturer
story: The first years of life are the most critical, yet the work of providing that initial care is often the most overlooked. As a dagplejer, my mother was the architect of early safety and curiosity for countless lives. Her legacy is one of foundational empathy—the understanding that the most complex systems of the future are built on the simple kindnesses of the past.
impact: A legacy of patience and the foundational care that allows others to thrive.
